entry.title: Time Series Chart Time Hierarchy graphic problem in Sap Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

I've created a Time Series chart in Sap Analytics Cloud using a time hierarchy. The underlying model is  a hana calculation view made in Business Application Studio.

The problem appeared this month and it shows only when i switch the time hierarchy to "Month".

If the hierarchy is set to "Day", it is correct:


 

If i switch to "Month" then it appears like this:

Why is it creating two different path? 

Thanks for helping me

entry.title: Re: What’s New in SAP Build – Q3 2024 Edition
entry.content:
Hi @EsmeeX ,

Thanks for the blog, this new Script Task Editor will be very handy for us pro code developers that are using the tool.

The only thing we are still missing now is a way to threat API call error, a "try catch" element, that is something that for sure would be very nice to allow a proper handle of an error before the flow stops, when I have time I will open a customer influence ticket for it because definetely it is something important, now we need to workaround the situation.

Regards,
Mauricio

entry.title: मैं मीशो से शिकायत कैसे कर सकता हूँ?
entry.content: मैं मीशो से शिकायत कैसे करूं? मीशो कस्टमर केयर पर कॉल कर (7600-78-62-12)-सकते हैं। आप *********** मीशो कस्टमर केयर को पर कॉल कर सकते हैं। मीशो कांटेक्ट नंबर: √-760×0786×212-√,भी भेज सकते हैं

entry.title: Re: मैं मीशो से शिकायत कैसे कर सकता हूँ?
Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 

I am a women, who have worked as a fashion designer for around 4 years. I am looking for a new area to explore and in today's world IT field is the thing that i am interested in specially the global product which is being used around the globe and it is  SAP. I am exploring in the HR domain which is SAP SuccessFactors and have completed a learning journey.

It would be highly appreciated if I receive the free attempt of SAP examination.
